systemic_low_risk_enlargement_equation.strength_term: A_sys_enlarge = mix(S_sys_expand_score, R_sys_expand, 1 - P_sys_expand, M_brain_direct_v28, R_train_v34)
systemic_low_risk_enlargement_equation.learning_term: L_sys_enlarge = mix(L_sys_expand, S_sys_expand_score, D_feature_v28, B_plastic_v34, R_train_v34)
systemic_low_risk_enlargement_equation.system_term: M_sys_enlarge = A_sys_enlarge + S_sys_enlarge + R_sys_enlarge + L_sys_enlarge - P_sys_enlarge

project_readout.summary: systemic low-risk zone enlargement validation checks whether systemic low-risk expansion begins to enlarge into a broader low-risk regime instead of only extending the previous edge.
project_readout.next_question: next verify whether this enlargement still survives after it is folded into the next brain direct chain and training bridge.
